title: penstemon parvus
intro: Penstemon parvus, also known as the small penstemon or Rocky Mountain penstemon, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of penstemon parvus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Penstemon parvus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal properties.
